holdings.infoBox: XYZY is an equity ETF with a total of 14 individual holdings.

overview.description: The YieldMax XYZ Option Income Strategy ETF (XYZY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund seeks to provide current income and capped gains on the Block stock (XYZ) through a synthetic covered call strategy, collateralized by cash and US Treasurys. The actively managed fund uses both standardized exchange-traded and FLEX options. XYZY was launched on Oct 10, 2023 and is issued by YieldMax.
